close_reason: Consolidated MetadataMerge routing into RoutingData.apply_mutations/2. Added 11 tests for apply_mutations, updated MetadataMerge to 2-arg merge for non-routing metadata only.
description:
Fold MetadataMerge module into RoutingData and add log_services field.

## Rationale

All of this is "routing data" - information needed to route mutations to logs:
- shard_table: key → shard tag
- log_map: index → log_id  
- log_services: log_id → {otp_name, node}
- replication_factor: how many logs per mutation

The current split (RoutingData struct + metadata.log_services) is arbitrary.

## New RoutingData struct

```elixir
defmodule RoutingData do
  @type t :: %__MODULE__{
    shard_table: :ets.table(),
    log_map: %{non_neg_integer() => Log.id()},
    log_services: %{Log.id() => {atom(), node()}},
    replication_factor: pos_integer()
  }
  
  defstruct [:shard_table, :log_map, :log_services, :replication_factor]
end
```

## Move from MetadataMerge

Fold `MetadataMerge.merge/3` into `RoutingData.apply_mutations/2`:

```elixir
@spec apply_mutations(t(), [{version, [mutation]}]) :: t()
def apply_mutations(%__MODULE__{} = routing_data, updates) do
  Enum.reduce(updates, routing_data, fn {_version, mutations}, acc ->
    Enum.reduce(mutations, acc, &apply_mutation/2)
  end)
end

defp apply_mutation({:set, key, value}, routing_data) do
  case SystemKeys.parse_key(key) do
    {:shard_key, end_key} ->
      tag = :erlang.binary_to_term(value)
      insert_shard(routing_data, end_key, tag)
      
    {:layout_log, log_id} ->
      service_ref = OtpRef.to_tuple(value)
      # Update BOTH log_map and log_services
      routing_data
      |> insert_log(log_id)
      |> put_log_service(log_id, service_ref)
      
    _ -> routing_data
  end
end
```

## What stays in metadata map

Only non-routing metadata:
- `shards` - detailed shard metadata (storage team info)
- `resolvers` - if dynamically updating resolver layout (separate concern)

## Changes

1. Add `log_services` field to RoutingData struct
2. Add `put_log_service/3`, `delete_log_service/2` methods
3. Move mutation application logic from MetadataMerge to RoutingData
4. Delete MetadataMerge module (or gut it to just handle non-routing metadata)
5. Update finalization to use `routing_data.log_services`

## Files

- routing_data.ex - add log_services, apply_mutations, mutation handling
- metadata_merge.ex - delete or reduce to non-routing metadata only
- finalization.ex - use routing_data.log_services instead of metadata.log_services
- Tests - consolidate metadata_merge tests into routing_data tests
title: Consolidate MetadataMerge into RoutingData with log_services
